storeDescription: The official Dunder Mifflin online store. Paper, merch, and awards — Scranton's finest since 1949.
quickPrompts: We're running low on paper, help!
I'm part of the Party Planning Committee and need to buy gifts for the team
It's the time of the year - we need to start awarding Dundies!!
I want a promotion. What can I buy for my manager?

products.name: World's Best Boss Mug
products.description: As seen on Michael Scott's desk. Self-declared, universally accepted. 11oz ceramic, dishwasher safe.

products.name: Assistant to the Regional Manager Mug
products.description: Not Assistant Regional Manager. There is a difference. Ask Dwight. 11oz ceramic.

products.name: That's What She Said Mug
products.description: Michael Scott's most versatile contribution to the English language. On a mug. 11oz ceramic.

products.name: Bears. Beets. Battlestar Galactica. Mug
products.description: Jim Halpert's most memorable impression, immortalised in ceramic. Dwight does not find it funny. 11oz.

products.name: Threat Level Midnight Mug
products.description: Inspired by Michael Scott's magnum opus screenplay. A collector's item for true fans. 11oz ceramic.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin Letter Paper
products.description: Premium 20lb, 92-bright paper. The paper Scranton runs on. 500 sheets per ream.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin A4 Paper
products.description: Same Scranton quality, international size. 80gsm, acid-free. 500 sheets per ream.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin Premium Bright
products.description: 98-bright, ultra-white paper. For presentations that demand to be noticed. Recycled — Dwight disapproves.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin Infinity Edition
products.description: Our tech-forward paper line. Ryan Howard approved. Features a watermark visible only under UV light.

products.name: Goldenrod Memo Paper
products.description: Phyllis's favourite. Pastel goldenrod colour for inter-office memos that actually get read.

products.name: Dundie — Best Salesperson
products.description: For the Dwight Schrute of your office. Engraved aluminium trophy, 12 inches tall.

products.name: Dundie — Best Smile
products.description: Some smiles just light up the break room. Ask Pam. Engraved aluminium trophy.

products.name: Dundie — Longest Lunch Break
products.description: Meredith holds the all-time record at 4 hours 17 minutes. Does your office have a contender?

products.name: Dundie — Most Dramatic Exit
products.description: Inspired by Michael Scott's legendary resignation. For the colleague who never leaves quietly.

products.name: Dundie — Most Likely to Eat the Profits
products.description: Kevin Malone's most celebrated achievement. Engraved aluminium trophy, 12 inches tall.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin Tote Bag
products.description: Heavy-duty canvas tote with the Dunder Mifflin logo. Fits a ream of paper — obviously.

products.name: Dunder Mifflin XL Tote Bag
products.description: For when one ream is never enough. Extra-large canvas with reinforced handles. Stanley approved.

products.name: Schrute Farms Tote Bag
products.description: Bed and Breakfast. Beet farm. Table-making. Proudly printed on 100% canvas. Dwight demands you use it daily.

products.name: Scranton: The Electric City Backpack
products.description: Represent the greatest city in northeast Pennsylvania. Padded laptop compartment. Kevin uses it for snacks.

products.name: Threat Level Midnight Tote
products.description: Limited edition. Inspired by Michael Scarn's greatest adventure. Black with gold foil print.
